'''Clascvoria''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ralltiir system/Legends|Ralltiir system]]. It was controlled by the [[Esselian Empire]] up until its collapse following the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="CCW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
